overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime driving through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player follows another vehicle through elevated highways, graffiti-covered underpasses, and dense urban streets lined with holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with concrete barriers

events.description: entering covered underpass section with overhead lighting
exiting underpass back into open night air

agents.ego_description: following a white vehicle along the elevated highway, maintaining steady speed through gentle curves

notable_agents.action: white sedan traveling ahead in the same lane, maintaining consistent speed

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with metal fencing running parallel to the highway
tall pole-mounted lights illuminating the highway at regular intervals
white sedan being followed along the highway
concrete overpass structure spanning across the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated urban highway at night, following a white sedan through gentle curves. The road is flanked by concrete sound barriers and illuminated by overhead street lights. The vehicle passes briefly through a covered underpass section before emerging back into the open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional highway with hotel architecture and graffiti walls

events.description: passing a multi-story hotel building with illuminated signage on the left
entering graffiti-covered underpass with colorful murals on concrete walls

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved exit ramp while following the lead vehicle past commercial buildings and under overpasses

entered.detail: multi-story modern building with illuminated hotel signage and horizontal white stripes
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
large advertising structures visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions into a more urban environment, passing a prominent hotel building with bright signage on the left. The vehicle enters a graffiti-covered underpass with colorful murals on the walls, while the target vehicle remains ahead. Overhead structures and billboards become visible as the scene shifts from open highway to enclosed urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approaching city center with holographic advertisements

events.description: city skyline with towering illuminated skyscrapers becomes visible in the distance
slight acceleration as the road opens up approaching the city center

agents.ego_description: cruising along the open highway toward the illuminated city center, passing under elevated roadways and alongside holographic billboards

entered.detail: towering futuristic buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline
large glowing digital advertisements and corporate signage floating above the road
raised roadway or monorail track running parallel to the main road

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up into a wide highway with clear views of the distant city skyline, featuring towering skyscrapers with countless illuminated windows. Holographic billboards and neon advertisements line the right side of the road, while elevated highway structures run parallel on the left. The road surface appears wet, reflecting the myriad of neon lights from the approaching metropolis.

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic lights and pedestrian crosswalk markings
slowing down and navigating through urban intersections with traffic signals

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban intersections, slowing for traffic signals and following the lead vehicle through turns in the neon-lit city center

notable_agents.action: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to pass before crossing

entered.detail: bright illuminated storefront signs and corporate logos on building facades
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
overhead traffic lights and intersection control signals

segments.scene_description: Entering the dense urban core with heavy neon lighting from all directions. The vehicle navigates through intersections marked with crosswalks and traffic signals, slowing down for urban traffic. Pedestrians wait at corners to cross, while towering skyscrapers now loom much closer, their facades covered in bright advertisements and illuminated signage. The wet streets reflect the vibrant neon colors of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a sterile elevated highway into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by following a white sedan along a curving highway flanked by concrete barriers, passing briefly through a covered underpass before emerging back into the open air. As the road shifts toward a more urban environment, the camera passes a brightly signed hotel and glides through a graffiti-covered underpass filled with colorful murals. The scene then expands onto a wide, wet highway that reflects the glow of holographic billboards and a distant skyline of towering skyscrapers. Finally, the vehicle enters the dense urban core, slowing down for intersections and pedestrians as the surrounding architecture looms closer, completely enveloping the view in vibrant neon advertisements and illuminated signage.
